articles.title: Broncos get star wide receiver Jaylen Waddle from Dolphins in a blockbuster trade, AP sources say
articles.original_title: Broncos get star wide receiver Jaylen Waddle from Dolphins in a blockbuster trade, AP sources say
articles.summary: The Denver Broncos have acquired standout wide receiver Jaylen Waddle in a blockbuster deal that sends three draft picks to the Miami Dolphins, including a first-rounder, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Tuesday.  The Dolphins will receive the 30th overall pick in next month’s NFL draft along with picks in the third and fourth rounds.  Denver will get Miami’s fourth-rounder along with Waddle.
